emails.subject: Re: FW: Lite Bytz RSVP
emails.body: Re: FW: Lite Bytz RSVP I have asked Bob Superty, Kim Theriot and Mechelle Stevens to attend. I don't have confirmation yet on whether or not all three will be able to attend. I thought that if asked three, that this should work on one of their schedules. I will let you know later who will attend. I will be out of the office that day. --sally To: ENW-Employees_Houston@ENRON
